name: Markets Closing Soon
description: Prediction markets approaching their resolution date — the final window to take a position. Sorted by closest end date, filtered for minimum volume and liquidity so you only surface markets with real trading activity. Excludes recurring micro-markets (5-minute price-direction bets) to focus on substantive events. Diversity by category ensures a mix of sports, politics, crypto, and culture.
customization_hints: Raise volume_24hr threshold (e.g. 10000) to only show markets with active last-minute trading
Raise liquidity_num to 50000 to focus on high-stakes markets only
Reduce span_days to 1 to include short-lived daily markets, or raise to 30 to only show longer-running events
Switch diversity method to 'semantic' with lambda 0.5 if category round-robin feels too rigid
Add price_under05_or_over95 exclusion if you only want genuinely contested markets (removes near-settled ones at 3¢ or 97¢)
